channel.title: Kerberos on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Kerberos on TLDRBins

item.title: Kerberos
item.description: Kerbrute Download kerbrute kerbrute userenum --domain example.com /usr/share/seclists/Usernames/xato-net-10-million-usernames.txt --dc 10.10.11.10 Generate Kerberos Ticket (From Linux) sudo apt install krb5-user cifs-utils # Step 1: Add domain controller to `/etc/hosts` 10.10.11.10 example.com dc01.example.com dc01 # Step 2: Add domain controller as a DNS server to `/etc/resolv.conf` nameserver 10.10.11.10 # Step 3: Edit `/etc/krb5.conf` [libdefaults] default_realm = EXAMPLE.COM [realms] example.com = { kdc = dc01.example.com:88 admin_serve = dc01.example.com default_domain = example.com } [domain_realm] .
